content.full_text:
January 13, 1992

Mr. Scott Hallabrin  
Fair Political Practices Commission  
428 "J" Street  
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Mr. Hallabrin:

I am Elaine White who had planned to run for the Assembly in June of 1992—"Elaine White for Assembly", I.D. #910534. As of Jan. '92, I have chosen not to run in 1992 and instead plan to run in 1994 for the Assembly. I will amend the 501 and 502 forms to become a candidate for the 1994 Assembly race.

Currently I have approximately $28,000 in the bank. I will not be terminating my committee as I will now be an Assembly candidate for 1994, but do wish to do at least two things with campaign funds:

1) return the full contribution of $3,000 to Dynamis, PAC#840 360

2) offer a pro-rata return to all of my other contributors

Please note that I'm not using surplus campaign funds.

I understand from Linda Cassidy that I can return Dynamis' full contribution of $3,000, and that the point in question is if I can offer a pro-rata return to all of my other contributors even though I will not be terminating my committee.

I would appreciate a telephone call (415-967-4400) prior to your written advice so that I can quickly follow through.

Sincerely,

Elaine K. White
